cases.title: Code Injection booking button opens hosted booking
requiredEvidence: Desktop screenshot showing the booking button
passCriteria: Button is visible without overlapping Ghost theme content
Button opens Cloudversify hosted booking in a new tab
No Ghost Admin API keys, Content API keys, OAuth tokens, or private credentials are visible in page source

cases.title: HTML card embedded hosted booking renders
requiredEvidence: Published Ghost post or page URL
Desktop screenshot showing iframe in the post or page body
Mobile screenshot showing iframe width fits the viewport
passCriteria: Fallback link is visible below the iframe

cases.title: Member context is public and routing-only
requiredEvidence: Published Ghost post or page URL
Opened booking URL containing member_segment when configured
Page source showing no private member identifiers
passCriteria: Configured member-segment is passed as member_segment
No email address, Ghost member ID, subscription ID, or private member data is present in public markup
Hosted booking remains the source of truth for eligibility and availability

cases.title: Missing organization slug fails visibly
requiredEvidence: Preview or published screenshot showing the configuration error
passCriteria: Widget shows a clear missing organization slug message
No broken empty link is shown
